tasks.title: Multi .env Profile Selector
tasks.description: Implement support for multiple .env config profiles (e.g., .env.prod, .env.dev, .env.local) and build a UI dropdown/selector in the KeyProxy interface to easily switch between active environments.

subtasks.title: Parse multiple .env files on startup and detect profiles
Build UI dropdown component for environment switching

tasks.title: Messenger Notifications Integration
tasks.description: Integrate Telegram bot and Slack webhook support to send alerts on token deprecation, rotation failures, or offline sync destinations.

subtasks.title: Fix Telegram integration with existing or new bot
Add Slack webhook support for alert delivery
Define alert trigger conditions (token expiry, sync failure, offline server)

tasks.title: Management Dashboard Tab
tasks.description: Create a dedicated management tab displaying a table of all active and failed sync destinations with metadata: time of last ping, health/validity status, and error logs.

subtasks.title: Design table schema: server URL, last ping, status, error count
Implement periodic health check polling per destination
Build Management tab UI with sortable table and status badges

tasks.title: Secure Credential Storage
tasks.description: Migrate sensitive data (passwords, tokens) out of plaintext .env files. Evaluate and implement OS-level secure credential stores (Windows Credential Manager, Keytar) or encrypted local vault.

subtasks.title: Research: Keytar vs Windows Credential Manager vs encrypted file
Implement chosen storage backend with read/write API
Migrate existing .env secret fields to secure store on first run
